footer.tagline: Experience personalized learning with AI-powered adaptive education. Our platform adjusts to your pace and learning style for optimal results.
footer.copyright: © {{year}} VR Meta University. Diploma Project by IT2-2217.

auth.learnSmarterDesc: Our AI-powered platform adapts to your learning pace, ensuring you're always challenged but never overwhelmed.
auth.startJourneyHeroDesc: Join thousands of learners who are mastering new skills with our adaptive learning platform.

errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters

home.heroDesc: Experience personalized education that adapts to your learning style. Our AI adjusts difficulty in real-time for optimal learning outcomes.

features.adaptiveDesc: Questions automatically adjust to your skill level, keeping you in the optimal learning zone.
features.progressDesc: Track your improvement with detailed analytics and performance insights.
features.pathDesc: AI creates a unique learning journey based on your strengths and areas to improve.

courses.selectLesson: Select a lesson or quiz from the sidebar
courses.selectLessonDesc: Work through each module in order. Complete the module quiz to unlock the next module.
courses.finalQuizDesc: This is the adaptive final assessment. It uses AI to adjust question difficulty in real time based on your performance. Good luck!
courses.takeMiniQuizVR: Take Mini Quiz in VR instead
courses.loginToAccess: Log in to access the full structured course with modules, lessons, and quizzes.

myLearning.title: My Learning
myLearning.welcomeBack: Welcome back, {{name}}! Continue where you left off.
myLearning.noCoursesDesc: Start exploring our catalog to begin your learning journey.

dashboard.noSessionsDesc: Complete your first quiz to start tracking your progress.

quiz.question: Question
quiz.dragDropNotice: This is a drag-and-drop question — available in VR mode. Crediting automatically…

results.completed: Quiz completed! Here's how you did:
results.advanced: You're performing at an advanced level!

errors.pageNotFoundDesc: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
